plugins.prepareCmd: jq --arg v "${nextRelease.version}" '.version=$v' .claude-plugin/plugin.json > .claude-plugin/plugin.json.tmp && mv .claude-plugin/plugin.json.tmp .claude-plugin/plugin.json && jq --arg v "${nextRelease.version}" '.plugins[0].version=$v' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json > .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.tmp && mv .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.tmp .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
